overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a highway median strip in a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The scene features concrete barriers with advertisements, digital billboards, passing vehicles, and transitions from open sky to covered overpass sections.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway median strip with advertising barriers

events.description: dark sedan passes by on the right side of the median

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway median strip, passing concrete barriers with advertisements

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the median on the right roadway

entered.detail: concrete barrier with illuminated 'CONSTICOS' advertisement showing a vehicle
raised concrete planter with dry bushes and red surface
white plastic trash bag sitting on the red paved median
elevated highway structure spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a highway median strip at dusk. The camera passes concrete barriers featuring illuminated 'CONSTICOS' advertisements and white trash bags. A black sedan drives past on the right roadway while the camera approaches an overpass structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with digital billboards

events.description: enters the covered area beneath the highway overpass, lighting shifts to artificial neon
futuristic car with glowing blue taillights passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, approaching a large digital billboard

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with illuminated taillights driving away from camera

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass with integrated lighting
large illuminated billboard displaying pink and red graphics with anime-style character
overhead directional signs with white arrows and text
thick concrete column with yellow wooden paneling at base

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the highway overpass, transitioning from open dusk to artificial neon lighting. Large digital billboards with pink graphics become visible overhead. The camera passes a concrete support pillar with yellow paneling while futuristic vehicles drive past on the adjacent roadways.

scene_state.functional_zone: median garden with cherry blossom tree

events.description: exits the covered overpass area back into open air with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking past a tree with pink blossoms while continuing down the median

entered.detail: tree with pink and red blossoms growing from the median planter

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered overpass, the scene opens to reveal a cherry blossom tree growing from the median. The camera passes a 'DELAMAIN' advertisement screen and continues along the concrete planter boxes. The overpass structure recedes into the background as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway approach to city center

events.description: camera pans down to inspect trash and debris on the median side
camera returns to forward facing position, revealing distant city skyline

agents.ego_description: briefly examining trash on the median edge before continuing forward toward the city center

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car with headlights on driving toward camera on left roadway

entered.detail: distant view of towering skyscrapers with neon lighting against the dusk sky
scattered garbage including cardboard boxes and plastic bags on the median

segments.scene_description: The camera pans down to inspect trash debris scattered on the median edge, then returns to a forward view revealing the distant futuristic city skyline with towering neon-lit skyscrapers. Vehicles pass by on both sides as the camera continues walking toward the city center, with overhead signage gantries spanning the highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a highway median that transitions from the open air of dusk into the artificial glow of a covered overpass. It begins by passing concrete barriers adorned with illuminated CONSTICOS advertisements and scattered white trash bags, while a black sedan speeds past on the adjacent roadway. As the camera approaches the looming overpass structure, the natural twilight fades and the environment shifts toward a neon-lit atmosphere. The scene then opens up beneath the concrete ceiling, where large digital billboards with pink graphics flicker overhead and the camera glides past a yellow-paneled support pillar amidst the flow of futuristic traffic.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the shelter of a covered overpass into the expansive, neon-lit vista of a futuristic city skyline. It begins by emerging from the overpass structure, passing a cherry blossom tree rooted in a concrete median and a glowing Delamain advertisement screen. As the camera continues forward, it briefly pans down to observe trash debris scattered along the edge of the walkway before returning to the horizon. The scene then opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers and overhead signage gantries, with vehicles streaming past on both sides of the highway. The movement finally pushes deeper toward the city center as the urban landscape expands in scale and light.
